php.description: General PHP conventions. Type safety, error handling, SQL safety, security, testing, dependency injection.

javascript.description: JavaScript conventions. Readability, control flow, async code, modules, and runtime boundaries.

typescript.description: TypeScript project conventions. Type safety, imports, narrowing, async code, and external API types.

react.description: React conventions. Components, props, state, effects, rendering, forms, and performance.

wordpress.description: WordPress plugin and theme development. Hooks, sanitization, data access, admin screens, REST.

wordpress-i18n.description: WordPress internationalization conventions for PHP and JavaScript. Text domains, translated output, placeholders, translator comments, and @wordpress/i18n.

wordpress-blocks.description: WordPress block editor conventions. block.json metadata, editor primitives, dynamic rendering, frontend behavior, and Interactivity API.

laravel.description: Laravel application development. Eloquent, service providers, middleware, queues.

codeception.description: Codeception testing framework. Unit, functional, and integration tests.

wp-browser.description: WP Browser testing for WordPress plugins. WPLoader, WPDb, WPBrowser, WPFilesystem, integration and end-to-end suites.

wordpress-components.description: @wordpress/components UI library. React components, form controls, modals, layout.

wordpress-data.description: @wordpress/data state management. Stores, selectors, actions, resolvers, React hooks.

workos-auth.description: WorkOS authentication. JWT/JWKS verification, AuthKit login, session middleware.
